hotwire.game_description: Hotwire is a game where you have to connect the cables to the vehicle to start the engine.

quick_keys.lock_unlock: Lock/Unlock your vehicle with this button.
quick_keys.start_stop: Start/Stop your vehicle engine with this button.
quick_keys.trunk: Open/Close your vehicle trunk with this button.
quick_keys.windows: Open/Close your vehicle windows with this button.

success.new_key_created: You have created a new key for %s
success.new_lock_created: You have created a new lock for %s
success.vehicle_keys_with_lockpick: You have acquired the keys to the vehicle

info.keys_require_locksmith: Visit the locksmith to obtain your keys.

error.no_keys: You do not have the keys to this vehicle
error.not_enough_money: You do not have enough money to create a new key
error.not_enough_money_lock: You do not have enough money to create a new lock
error.item_on_cooldown: You must wait 5 seconds before using the item again
error.no_near_vehicle: The vehicle this key belongs to is not nearby.
error.no_vehicles: You do not have any vehicles to create a new key or lock.
error.too_many_uses: You have used this item too many times
error.vehicle_locked_cannot_break_windows: Vehicle is locked, you cannot break the windows

context_menu.create_new_key_description: You can only create a spare key without changing the lock mechanism.
context_menu.create_new_lock_description: You can create a new lock by changing the lock mechanism. It will not work with old keys.

keys_menu.title: Vehicle Keys
keys_menu.subtitle: Quick actions
keys_menu.lock_unlock_desc: Toggle the central locking of the vehicle.
keys_menu.windows_desc: Roll the windows up or down.
keys_menu.search_keys_desc: Search the interior for a spare key.
